Q: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is transforming the world. It enables machines to learn from data and perform tasks that traditionally required human intelligence. While it brings immense benefits, such as automation and insights, it also raises ethical concerns and challenges.

A.Summary: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is transforming the world . It enables machines to learn from data and perform tasks that traditionally required human intelligence . While it brings immense benefits, such as automation and insights, it also raises ethical concerns .
